rss_feeds.name: Novaya Gazeta Europe
rss_feeds.notes: Independent, operates from exile in EU

rss_feeds.name: Meduza
rss_feeds.notes: Independent Russian news outlet, operates from Latvia

rss_feeds.name: Global Times
rss_feeds.notes: Run by the Chinese Communist Party

rss_feeds.name: South China Morning Post
rss_feeds.notes: Hong Kong-based, owned by Alibaba, increasingly cautious on China coverage

rss_feeds.name: ANI (Asian News International)
rss_feeds.notes: India's largest news wire, close to government

rss_feeds.name: Al Arabiya English
rss_feeds.notes: Saudi government-aligned, owned by MBC Group (close to royal court)

rss_feeds.name: Mada Masr
rss_feeds.notes: Independent investigative journalism, critical of government

rss_feeds.name: Reuters
rss_feeds.notes: Reuters removed direct RSS in 2020; Google News workaround listed

rss_feeds.name: Foreign Affairs
rss_feeds.notes: Premium publication on international relations and geopolitics

rss_feeds.name: Stratfor / RANE Worldview
rss_feeds.notes: Geopolitical intelligence platform, now part of RANE
